channel.title: Paper on colored-dye's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Paper on colored-dye's blog

item.title: Notes on "Scalable Multi-Stage Influence Function for Large Language Models via EKFAC"
item.description:
Notes on “Scalable Multi-Stage Influence Function for Large Language Models via EKFAC”

I am working on other projects and have yet managed to polish the Appendix for the IJCAI paper. So I might as well post the unpolished version with the Appendix here, in case anyone needs it.
